meaning: n.绿玉,绿宝石 Beryl 贝里尔(女子名)
examples: Few passers-by could identify her then as Beryl Bainbridge, the famous novelist.
Beryl is a beryllium-aluminum silicate, and its color comes from small amounts of chromium.
It is one of the most popular stones from the beryl family, alongside aquamarine and emerald.
It is now thought Beryl Hope, 70, who died in August 2011, was given contaminated products.
He is survived by Beryl, his wife of 67 years, daughter Jane and their three grandchildren.
